mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS attempted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct FROM user_answer WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ua.item_type AS problemType, COUNT(*) AS attempted, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct FROM user_answer ua WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ua.item_type

SELECT TRIM(s.name) AS category, COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ua.is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN problem p ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY TRIM(s.name)
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem) AS objective_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subjective_problems) AS subjective_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM programming_language_problems) AS programming_count

SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, p.question, p.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN problem p ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false UNION ALL SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, sp.question, sp.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN subjective_problems sp ON ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = sp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false UNION ALL SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, plp.question, plp.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN programming_language_problems plp ON ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND ua.reference_id = plp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false ORDER BY submittedAt DESC, id DESC

SELECT COALESCE( CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' THEN p.subject_id END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' THEN sp.subject_id END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' THEN plp.subject_id END ) AS subjectId, COALESCE( CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' THEN TRIM(s.name) END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' THEN TRIM(ss.name) END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' THEN TRIM(sls.name) END ) AS subjectName, COUNT(*) AS attemptedCount FROM user_answer ua LEFT JOIN problem p ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id LEFT JOIN subject s ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND p.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN subjective_problems sp ON ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN subject ss ON ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND sp.subject_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN programming_language_problems plp ON ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND ua.reference_id = plp.id LEFT JOIN subject sls ON ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND plp.subject_id = sls.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY COALESCE( CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' THEN p.subject_id END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' THEN sp.subject_id END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' THEN plp.subject_id END ), COALESCE( CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' THEN TRIM(s.name) END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' THEN TRIM(ss.name) END, CASE WHEN ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' THEN TRIM(sls.name) END ) ORDER BY attemptedCount DESC

SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, p.question, p.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN problem p ON ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = p.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false AND DATE(ua.submitted_at) = #{date} UNION ALL SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, sp.question, sp.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN subjective_problems sp ON ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND ua.reference_id = sp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false AND DATE(ua.submitted_at) = #{date} UNION ALL SELECT ua.id, ua.item_type AS problemType, ua.reference_id AS referenceId, plp.question, plp.answer AS correctAnswer, ua.submitted_answer AS submittedAnswer, ua.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN programming_language_problems plp ON ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND ua.reference_id = plp.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.is_correct = false AND DATE(ua.submitted_at) = #{date} ORDER BY submittedAt DESC, id DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.id AS problemId, TRIM(s.name) AS subject, SUBSTRING(p.question, 1, 60) AS questionText, COUNT(*) AS wrongCount FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN problem p ON ua.reference_id = p.id INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.item_type = 'OBJECTIVE' AND ua.is_correct = false GROUP BY p.id, s.name, p.question
UNION ALL
SELECT sp.id AS problemId, TRIM(ss.name) AS subject, SUBSTRING(sp.question, 1, 60) AS questionText, COUNT(*) AS wrongCount FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN subjective_problems sp ON ua.reference_id = sp.id INNER JOIN subject ss ON sp.subject_id = ss.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.item_type = 'SUBJECTIVE' AND ua.is_correct = false GROUP BY sp.id, ss.name, sp.question
UNION ALL
SELECT plp.id AS problemId, TRIM(sls.name) AS subject, SUBSTRING(plp.question, 1, 60) AS questionText, COUNT(*) AS wrongCount FROM user_answer ua INNER JOIN programming_language_problems plp ON ua.reference_id = plp.id INNER JOIN subject sls ON plp.subject_id = sls.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} AND ua.item_type = 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AND ua.is_correct = false GROUP BY plp.id, sls.name, plp.question ) combined ORDER BY wrongCount DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
